summary_text: ### 修正対象 [scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs index e2320497..9f0a13ca 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -1,7 +1,7 @@ #!/usr/bin/env node import { appendFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, renameSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; -import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto"; +import { createHash, randomUUID } from "node:crypto"; import os from "node:os"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; @@ -196,9 +196,67 @@ function statePath(id) { return path.join(RUN_DIR, `${id}.json`); } +function projectOsTicketPath(runState) { + return path.join(runState.project, ".project-os", "tickets", `${runState.runId}.json`); +} + +function projectOsArtifactPath(runState) { + return path.join(runState.project, ".project-os", "artifacts", `${runState.runId}-completion.json`); +} + +function planningLaneCount(runState) { + return planningMatrix(runState).matrix.lanes.length; +} + +function implementationLaneNames(runState) { + const impl = implementationMatrix(runState); + if (impl.matrix?.lanes) return impl.matrix.lanes.map((lane) => lane.name); + return impl.lane ? [impl.lane] : []; +} + +function lanesUsed(runState) { + const lanes = []; + if (runState.planResult) lanes.push(...planningMatrix(runState).matrix.lanes.map((lane) => lane.name)); + if (runState.simulationResult) lanes.push(...simulationMatrix(runState, runState.planResult?.summary || runState.task).matrix.lanes.map((lane) => lane.name)); + if (runState.implementationResult) lanes.push(...implementationLaneNames(runState)); + return [...new Set(lanes)]; +} + +function writeProjectOsTicket(runState) { + writeJson(projectOsTicketPath(runState), { + ticket_id: runState.runId, + purpose: runState.task, + priority: "medium", + acceptance_criteria: runState.requirementsPacket?.acceptance_criteria || [], + definition_of_done: runState.requirementsPacket?.done_criteria || {}, + status: runState.phase, + planning_diversity_evidence: planningLaneCount(runState), + implementation_subagents: implementationLaneNames(runState), + authority_scope: "fugue_execution", + }); +} + +function writeCompletionEnvelope(runState) { + const summary = finalSummary(runState); + writeJson(projectOsArtifactPath(runState), { + schema_version: "1.0", + ticket_id: runState.runId, + acceptance_text: summary, + acceptance_hash: createHash("sha256").update(summary).digest("hex"), + authority_scope: "fugue_execution_only", + completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), + lanes_used: lanesUsed(runState), + }); +} + function saveState(state, patch = {}) { + const previousPhase = state.phase; const next = { ...state, ...patch, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() }; writeJson(statePath(next.runId), next); + if (next.project && patch.phase && patch.phase !== previousPhase) { + writeProjectOsTicket(next); + if (next.phase === "done") writeCompletionEnvelope(next); + } Object.assign(state, next); return next; } @@ -557,6 +615,7 @@ async function main() { if (!args.task) usage(1); const initial = saveState(buildInitialState(args)); activeRunId = initial.runId; + writeProjectOsTicket(initial); recordPhase(initial, "requirements", initial.requirementsPacket); appendJsonl(RUN_LOG, { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), runId: initial.runId, type: "fugue-execute", status: "started" }); updateProviderState(initial, "started"); ``` ### 検証結果 `node --check scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` は成功しました。 仮定: `writeCompletionEnvelope(runState)` の `acceptance_text (=summary)` は、専用の `summary` フィールドが `runState` に存在しないため、既存の `finalSummary(state)` を使用しています。影響範囲は completion artifact の本文だけで、既存の実行フローや判定条件は変えていません。
